title: ICanGamez Spells
description: This is a small datapack that adds vanilla looking spells to minecraft!
body:
This is a repost of a older datapack I made that included 16 New spell books!
They use xp to cast spells, casting strength depends on the book.

It adds 5 new spell books.

- Fireball Spell
- Health Spell
- Lighting Spell
- Void Spell
- Decoy Spell
- Fangs Spell 1
- Fangs Spell 2
- Sight Spell
- Cursed Spell
- Ice Spell
- Sculk Spell
- Evoker Spell
- War Spell
- Medical Spell
- Mechanical Spell


Enjoy!
